hardFilters.label: Tesla excluded
hardFilters.description: Tesla vehicles are excluded regardless of score.

hardFilters.label: No offensive feature subscriptions
hardFilters.description: Subscription-gated hardware comfort features are a serious red flag and may become a veto.

criteria.label: Sound / audio
criteria.description: Audio system quality, cabin quietness, bass/sub quality, lack of rattles, media integration.

criteria.label: Performance
criteria.description: Strong acceleration and enjoyable power delivery. Fast is a positive, especially when the car can relax in normal driving.

criteria.label: Comfort / ride
criteria.description: Ride quality, seat comfort, motorway refinement and whether suspension/drive modes can prioritise comfort.

criteria.label: Dashboard / controls
criteria.description: Integrated displays, avoidance of stuck-on-tablet design, physical controls for core functions, no silly touchscreen-only basics.

criteria.label: Phone integration
criteria.description: Reliable Bluetooth, CarPlay/Android Auto, reconnection behaviour, multiple-driver handling, app/key reliability.

criteria.label: Security / theft resistance
criteria.description: Keyless theft mitigation, alarm/immobiliser strength, tracking options, app/key security, insurance implications and practical anti-theft setup.

criteria.label: Premium feel / quality
criteria.description: Interior quality, fit/finish, durability confidence, dealer/support confidence.

criteria.label: Range + charging
criteria.description: Real-world range, charging curve, 10-80% time, charging network practicality.

criteria.label: Salary-sacrifice value
criteria.description: Monthly cost versus what the car delivers, with the EV6 GT as the mental benchmark.

criteria.label: Software / ADAS annoyance
criteria.description: Infotainment responsiveness, OTA maturity, app reliability, driver-assistance nags and false interventions.
